title: Masked Visual Actions for Unified World Modeling
innovation_summary: Masked Visual Actions for Unified World Modeling: We introduce Masked Visual Actions, a pixel-space control interface that expresses action as a partially revealed trajectory of an arbitrary entity in a video.
